$comment: Design token file for the Toolbar component
$description: Compact bar that groups a set of icon action Buttons. Comes in three types across two orientations: 'floating' (horizontal, self-contained pill with full border, rounded corners, and a drop shadow), 'default' (the vertical equivalent — same floating treatment stacked as a column), and 'docked' (horizontal full-width bar pinned to the bottom of a screen with a single top border, extra bottom padding for the home-safe area, and no shadow or corner radius). Slots 3-6 simply show/hide additional action buttons and carry no tokens. The Button sub-component (node 3029:4311, same Figma file) supplies all button-level tokens (background, icon padding, icon size, button radius/border/shadow) — this file captures only the toolbar container layout.

background.description: White background for the toolbar container - background neutral base - #ffffff

width.description: Container border width - applied on all edges for the floating/vertical types and on the top edge only for the docked type - default - 1px

color.description: Subtle gray border/separator color for the toolbar - border neutral subtle 2 - #eaecf0

gap.description: Spacing between adjacent action buttons inside the toolbar - md - 12px

floating.description: Self-contained toolbar treatment used by the horizontal 'floating' type and the vertical 'default' type. Full border on all sides, rounded corners, drop shadow, and uniform padding.

padding.description: Uniform inset on all sides of the floating toolbar container - lg - 16px

border-radius.description: Rounded corners of the floating toolbar container - 2xl - 16px

shadow.description: Drop shadow that lifts the floating toolbar above the content - sm

docked.description: Horizontal full-width bar pinned to the bottom of a screen. Single top border separates it from scrollable content; no corner radius or shadow. Buttons are distributed edge-to-edge with space-between.

padding-top.description: Top inset of the docked toolbar - 4 - 16px

padding-bottom.description: Bottom inset of the docked toolbar - larger than the top to clear the home-safe area - 8 - 32px

padding-x.description: Horizontal inset on the left and right edges of the docked toolbar - md - 16px

width.description: Docked toolbar stretches to the full device width

justify.description: Action buttons are distributed edge-to-edge across the docked toolbar
